message: ci: use Playwright container for browser E2E tests

files.patch:
@@ -40,37 +40,31 @@ jobs:
         working-directory: packages/browser
         run: npm test
 
-  # E2E tests (requires browser)
+  # E2E tests (requires browser) - uses Playwright container
   e2e:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     needs: unit-tests
+    container:
+      image: mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.52.0-noble
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
-      - name: Setup Node.js
-        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
-        with:
-          node-version: 20
-
       - name: Setup Zig
-        uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
-        with:
-          version: 0.15.2
+        run: |
+          apt-get update && apt-get install -y xz-utils
+          curl -L https://ziglang.org/download/0.15.2/zig-linux-x86_64-0.15.2.tar.xz | tar -xJ
+          echo "$PWD/zig-linux-x86_64-0.15.2" >> $GITHUB_PATH
 
       - name: Build WASM module
-        run: zig build wasm
+        run: zig-linux-x86_64-0.15.2/zig build wasm
 
       - name: Copy WASM to examples
         run: cp zig-out/bin/lanceql.wasm examples/wasm/
 
-      - name: Install dependencies and Playwright
+      - name: Install dependencies
         working-directory: packages/browser
         run: npm install
 
-      - name: Install Playwright browsers
-        working-directory: packages/browser
-        run: npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
-
       - name: Run E2E tests
         working-directory: packages/browser
         run: npx playwright test --project=chromium

@@ -32,6 +32,7 @@ Thumbs.db
 # Generated benchmark data
 benchmarks/*.lance/
 benchmarks/*.parquet
+benchmarks/*_results.json
 data/
 *.dylib
 *.wasm
